shortDescription.text: Open Redirect via unvalidated user-supplied URL

message.text: The /learn endpoint redirects to a URL taken directly from req.query.url without any validation or whitelist check. An attacker can craft a link such as /learn?url=https://evil.com to redirect authenticated users to a malicious site, enabling phishing or credential theft. The redirect target must be validated against an allowlist of trusted domains.

The tutorial router is mounted at /tutorial without the isLoggedIn middleware, unlike most other routes in the application. While the tutorial pages use a hardcoded whitelist of page names (a1-a10, redos, ssrf) which prevents path traversal, the lack of authentication means tutorial content is accessible to unauthenticated users. This is likely intentional but should be confirmed, as tutorial pages may reference internal application details useful for reconnaissance.
